info.name: Ecommerce Microservices (Robust)
info.description:
Robust collection for Products, Shopping, and Customer microservices via Nginx Proxy.

## Setup
1. Import this collection
2. Create an environment with `base_url = http://localhost:8000`
3. Run 'Customer / Signup' then 'Customer / Login' — token is auto-saved
4. Use 'Products / Create Product' and the ID is auto-saved for cart requests

## Variables used
- `base_url` — set in environment (default: http://localhost:8000)
- `user_token` — auto-set after Login
- `product_id` — auto-set after Create Product

item.description:
Run this folder via Collection Runner to seed all 7 sample products in one go.

Run order:
  1. 7x Create Product (fruits, vegetables, oils)
  2. 3x Category Verification (fruits=4, vegetables=2, oils=1)
  3. 1x Total Count Check (all 7 names present)

After seeding, product_id holds the last created product _id.

item.name: Health & Sanity Checks

request.description: Confirms the Nginx proxy itself is responding.
Confirms the Products microservice is reachable.
Confirms the Shopping microservice is reachable.

item.description: Quick checks to verify all services are reachable through the Nginx proxy.
